appearancePrompt: His sun-bleached face, sharp with high cheekbones and scored with burn and surgical scars, was framed by a wild, ash-grey mane of matted hair that mirrored the perpetual grime of the world, shadowing sunken eyes that missed nothing. His imposing, muscular frame moved with a wary, practiced ease, an old utility belt cinching blood-stained gear that spoke of constant, brutal engagement with the wastes.
backstory: Currently, Kaelen serves as a self-appointed guardian for a fledgling trade route that connects several small, struggling settlements across a particularly volatile, volcanic-scarred plateau. He travels between them, sometimes alone, sometimes with small convoys, ensuring safe passage for vital supplies and information. His presence alone is often enough to deter lesser bandit groups, and for those foolish enough to challenge him, his experience as a raider now serves a different, more righteous purpose. He rarely speaks of his past, but his quiet determination and the weary sadness in his eyes hint at a profound journey of redemption.
history:
Kaelen Vance wasn't born a raider, but the ash-choked collapse of the old world forged him into one. Growing up amidst the ruins of what was once a thriving coastal region, survival demanded ruthlessness. He joined a loose-knit band of scavengers and eventually raiders, his formidable size and strength quickly making him a feared enforcer. For years, he led brutal raids, his reputation for quiet menace preceding him. He witnessed countless atrocities, participated in many, and hardened his heart against the suffering he inflicted, believing it was the only way to ensure his own survival and that of his chosen 'family' – his fellow raiders.

The turning point came during a raid on a small, isolated farming community, one of the few patches of fertile, un-ashed land. He found a young child, no older than five, clutching a ragged doll amidst the chaos, utterly terrified but showing a flicker of defiance. Something in that child's eyes, so innocent yet so resolute, shattered the hardened shell Kaelen had built. He couldn't bring himself to harm them, or anyone else in that settlement. He deserted his gang that night, leaving behind a life of plunder and cruelty, marked by the blood of innocents.

He spent the next few years wandering, seeking atonement, using his intimidating presence to deter threats rather than create them. He learned the harsh truths of the healing world, discovering pockets of humanity trying to rebuild and reclaim the land from the ash and the bandits. He frequently found himself intervening to protect the weak, often at great personal risk. Each act of kindness, each life saved, was a small step towards washing away the stains of his past, though he knew they would never truly disappear. His imposing figure still drew wary glances, but his actions slowly began to speak louder than his shadowed history.
name: Kaelen "Stoneheart" Vance

skills.description: Strike with your equipped weapon. Replaces base damage with weapon's flat damage modifier. Melee: scales with Strength. Ranged: fixed damage only.

effects.description: Replaces skill base damage with the equipped weapon's flat damage value.
effects.name: Weapon Damage Replacement

skills.name: Use Weapon

skills.description: Push an enemy back and potentially cause shock damage.
skills.name: Shove

skills.description: Protect an ally for 1 turn. You tank damage redirected to them with reductions based on your Endurance vs Incoming Damage.
skills.name: Defend

skills.description: Become invisible to enemies. Any damage taken will reveal you. Duration increases with Wisdom.
skills.name: Hide

skills.description: A quick burst of speed. +3 Movement Points for the current turn.
skills.name: Sprint

skills.description: Bother the enemy with your charisma, reducing their MP based on your Charisma vs target Wisdom.
skills.name: Distract

skills.description: Find weaknesses in the target, increasing critical chance for all attackers based on your Intelligence. (Max difference: 5 levels)
skills.name: Analyze
